constraintLeaderboard.description: Shopify integration is completely broken — no OAuth flow, no webhook handlers, no sales data sync, blocking AI Staffing Optimizer, Midday Pulse, and Morning Whisper
constraintLeaderboard.goal: Shopify Deep Sync completion — ensure real-time sales data streaming is bulletproof with retry logic, dead letter queues, and reconciliation checks
evidenceFromCrawl: No /api/shopify/* routes found in crawl results
No Shopify OAuth callback endpoint detected
No webhook receiver endpoints for sales data
Scenario test 'Shopify Connect' failed with 'No OAuth flow found'
unblocks: AI Staffing Optimizer can analyze real sales patterns
Midday Pulse can compare actual vs. target sales
Morning Whisper can include yesterday's sales context
Daily Debrief can capture sales performance
Opening/Closing Checklist SOPs can reference sales targets
Manager dashboards can display real-time sales metrics
Pattern recognition can detect sales trends for SOP updates

constraintLeaderboard.description: Critical database connection failure causing 500 errors on all employee-facing API endpoints
constraintLeaderboard.goal: Reliability of LIVE features — Clock-in/out, geofencing, scheduling, payroll reports, task assignment, and Clerk auth MUST work flawlessly
unblocks: Task assignment and tracking becomes possible
All database-dependent API routes become functional

cycleHistory.constraint: Shopify integration is completely broken — no OAuth flow, no webhook handlers, no sales data sync, blocking AI Staffing Optimizer, Midday Pulse, and Morning Whisper
Critical database connection failure causing 500 errors on all employee-facing API endpoints

activeConstraint.description: Critical database connection failure causing 500 errors on all employee-facing API endpoints
activeConstraint.why: The Drizzle ORM database connection is failing or misconfigured, causing every endpoint that touches the database to return 500 errors. This blocks clock-in/out, schedule viewing, task assignment, and payroll — all LIVE features marked as highest priority.
unblocks: Task assignment and tracking becomes possible
All database-dependent API routes become functional
activeConstraint.goal: Reliability of LIVE features — Clock-in/out, geofencing, scheduling, payroll reports, task assignment, and Clerk auth MUST work flawlessly

steps.description: Verify Drizzle database connection setup. Check that DATABASE_URL environment variable is properly accessed, Neon serverless connection pooling is configured correctly, and connection options include ssl: true for Neon. Add connection error handling and logging.
successCriteria: Database client exports successfully
Connection string is valid and references Replit Secrets
SSL configuration is present for Neon
Error handling logs connection failures

steps.description: Add proper error handling and logging to time-entries routes. Wrap database queries in try-catch blocks. Log specific error details (error type, message, stack trace) to help diagnose database connection issues. Return structured error responses.
successCriteria: All route handlers have try-catch blocks
Errors are logged with structured context
Errors return proper JSON shape: { success: false, error: { message, code } }
HTTP status codes match error types (500 for DB errors)

steps.description: Add proper error handling and logging to schedules routes. Wrap database queries in try-catch blocks. Log specific error details. Return structured error responses.
successCriteria: All route handlers have try-catch blocks
Errors are logged with structured context
Errors return proper JSON shape
HTTP status codes match error types

steps.description: Add database connection health check at server startup. Test database connectivity before starting Express server. Log connection success or detailed failure. If connection fails, exit with clear error message rather than starting a broken server.
successCriteria: Health check runs before server.listen()
Connection test uses actual database query (SELECT 1)
Success is logged
Failure logs detailed error and exits with non-zero code

activeConstraint.completionCriteria: All employee-facing API endpoints return proper responses (200 with data for successful auth, 401/403 for missing auth) instead of 500 errors. Database connection is stable and verified on server startup.
